message:
fix(render-term): pass explicit scale factors through rendering pipeline and update golden SVGs

Refactor bounds_to_cells and point_to_cells to accept explicit
scale_x/scale_y parameters instead of computing them from the tier
config internally. This allows callers (render_node_box,
render_cluster_box, render_edge_path, composite_labels) to propagate
consistent scaling through the entire rendering pipeline. The
cluster/node/edge rendering functions now also accept padding_x/
padding_y parameters for proper offset calculation.

This fixes inconsistencies where different rendering stages could
compute slightly different scales, causing misaligned overlays in
the terminal renderer. The golden SVG test fixtures are updated to
reflect the corrected layout geometry.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
